def Ideal.inter (I J : Ideal R) : Ideal R where
  carrier := I ∩ J
  add_mem' := by
    sorry
  zero_mem' := by
    have h₁ : (0 : R) ∈ I := I.zero_mem
    have h₂ : (0 : R) ∈ J := J.zero_mem
    exact Set.mem_inter h₁ h₂

def Ideal.inter (I J : Ideal R) : Ideal R where
  carrier := I

have hI : (0 : R) ∈ I := by
      exact I.zero_mem
    have hJ : (0 : R) ∈ J := by
      exact J.zero_mem
    exact ⟨hI, hJ⟩

have h₁ : (0 : R) ∈ I := by
      exact I.zero_mem
    have h₂ : (0 : R) ∈ J := by
      exact J.zero_mem
    exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

have h₁ : (0 : R) ∈ I := I.zero_mem
    have h₂ : (0 : R) ∈ J := J.zero_mem
    exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩
